div1.entryFree: Unaccustomed, unusual, extraordinary, strange: leave this peevish broil and set this u. fight aside, H6A III, 1, 93. what u. cause procures her hither? Rom. III, 5, 68. shall give him such an u. dram, that he shall soon keep Tybalt company, Rom. III, 5, 68 an u. spirit lifts me above the ground, V, 1, 4. the u. terror of this night, Caes. II, 1, 199.
